summary: PR #2576 matched six particle functions in src/sysdolphin/baselib/particle.c, improved five additional particle report items, widened hsd_8039F05C linkNo from s8 to s32 in the header and implementation, and widened efLib_CreateGenerator's local linkNo from u8 to int to keep its caller code matched.

key_files.role: Primary matching work: six particle functions matched, ps_remove_node scheduling adjusted, state globals accessed through local struct pointers, generator jobj/ref_INC null-check shape changed, and hsd_8039F05C prototype widened.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/sysdolphin/baselib/particle.c added 40 deleted 34 hunks 11
human_pr_text: matches six functions in src/sysdolphin/baselib/particle.c
raw_diff: particle.c hunks for hsd_80393D2C, ps_remove_node, hsd_803966A0, hsd_80396C78, fn_80397374, hsd_8039EFAC, hsd_8039F05C, hsd_8039F6CC

key_files.role: Owning header prototype updated for hsd_8039F05C first parameter from s8 linkNo to s32 linkNo.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/sysdolphin/baselib/particle.h added 1 deleted 1 hunks 1
raw_diff: hsd_8039F05C(s8 linkNo, ...) changed to hsd_8039F05C(s32 linkNo, ...)
human_pr_text: corrects first parameter of hsd_8039F05C from s8 to s32

key_files.role: Caller-side local type adjusted in efLib_CreateGenerator from u8 linkNo to int linkNo to align with widened particle API and preserve caller match.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/ef/eflib.c added 1 deleted 1 hunks 1
raw_diff: efLib_CreateGenerator local linkNo changed from u8 to int
human_pr_text: efLib_CreateGenerator's local linkNo is widened from u8 to int so caller remains matched

what_changed: Matched six functions reported by the PR body and GALE01 bot report: hsd_80393D2C, hsd_803966A0, hsd_80396C78, fn_80397374, hsd_8039EFAC, and hsd_8039F6CC.
Improved five unmatched report items: hsd_80395D88, hsd_803962A8, hsd_80396A20, fn_80397814, and hsd_8039F05C.
Changed hsd_8039F05C's first parameter type from s8 to s32 in particle.c and particle.h.
Changed efLib_CreateGenerator's local linkNo from u8 to int.
Introduced local struct pointer aliases for hsd_804CF7E8 and hsd_804CF810 in affected particle functions, replacing repeated direct global-address expressions.
Changed ps_remove_node's head pointer setup into an assignment expression inside the null check.
Added a tightly scoped #pragma push / #pragma dont_inline on / #pragma pop block around hsd_80393D2C.
Changed hsd_8039EFAC and hsd_8039F6CC to use nested gen and jobj null-checks before assigning gen->jobj and calling ref_INC(jobj).

smart_moves.text: Prototype correction was applied consistently at the implementation, header, and caller local variable site, avoiding caller-side narrowing and aligning with the surrounding linkNo API convention described in the PR body.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: hsd_8039F05C first parameter corrected from s8 to s32; efLib_CreateGenerator local widened from u8 to int
raw_diff: particle.c and particle.h hsd_8039F05C signature changes
raw_diff: eflib.c efLib_CreateGenerator local linkNo changed to int

smart_moves.text: The PR removed stale TODO comments for functions that the report shows became 100.00% matched.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: TODO comments removed before hsd_803966A0, hsd_80396C78, fn_80397374, hsd_8039EFAC, and hsd_8039F6CC
text_corpus issue_comment: GALE01 report lists six new matches at 100.00%

smart_moves.text: Using local state pointers such as sp reduced repeated global-address expressions and was part of the matching edits for particle screen/console state functions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: hsd_80393D2C introduces struct ParticleConsoleState* sp = &hsd_804CF7E8
raw_diff: hsd_803966A0 and fn_80397374 use struct ParticleScreenState* sp = &hsd_804CF810

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a parameter's real width is recovered, update the owning header and nearby caller locals together; here, hsd_8039F05C linkNo changed from s8 to s32 and efLib_CreateGenerator's linkNo local changed from u8 to int to avoid spurious narrowing.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: widened prototype removes spurious caller-side narrowing
raw_diff: hsd_8039F05C signature changed to s32 linkNo
raw_diff: efLib_CreateGenerator local linkNo changed to int

decomp_lessons.lesson: For baselib particle state code, preserving a local pointer to the global state struct can affect register allocation and matching, as shown by hsd_80393D2C, hsd_803966A0, and fn_80397374.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: local sp introduced for hsd_804CF7E8 and hsd_804CF810
text_corpus issue_comment: hsd_80393D2C, hsd_803966A0, and fn_80397374 reported at 100.00%

decomp_lessons.lesson: Small source-shape changes in inline helpers can matter for scheduling; ps_remove_node's head_ptr assignment was folded into the null check, and related particle functions reached 100.00% according to the report.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ps_remove_node head_ptr assignment folded into if (*(head_ptr = &sp->xD0) == NULL)
raw_diff: removed TODOs mentioning ps_remove_node inline scheduling
text_corpus issue_comment: hsd_80396C78 and fn_80397374 listed as new matches

naming_conventions.convention: Particle generator APIs use an int/s32-width linkNo parameter according to this PR's body and the surrounding particle API signatures in the diff.

naming_conventions.name: sp

raw_diff: struct ParticleScreenState* sp = &hsd_804CF810

naming_conventions.name: jobj
naming_conventions.convention: Generator creation functions use jobj for HSD_JObj* parameters and assign it to gen->jobj before ref_INC when non-null.

notes: No human review comments are present in the slice; review feedback is limited to the automated decomp report.
The PR body claims python configure.py --require-protos and ninja were run, but the slice does not include command logs.
The dont_inline pragma is evidenced by the diff and match report, but the slice does not include adjacent-function regression details required to generalize it as normal style.
The hsd_8039F05C TODO remains an unresolved note about .bss.0 section anchor hoist and register-allocation cascade; it should not be treated as a solved tactic.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Recovering linkNo width can require header and caller-local updates
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2576, hsd_8039F05C's linkNo parameter was widened from s8 to s32 in particle.c and particle.h, and efLib_CreateGenerator's local linkNo was widened from u8 to int. The PR body states this matched the surrounding particle API convention and removed spurious caller-side narrowing.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text
raw_diff

accepted_candidate_records.title: Particle state globals sometimes match better through local state pointers
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2576 rewrote repeated direct accesses to hsd_804CF7E8 and hsd_804CF810 through local sp pointers in matched particle functions. GALE01 reported hsd_80393D2C, hsd_803966A0, and fn_80397374 at 100.00%.
evidence_refs: raw_diff
text_corpus issue_comment

source_update_candidates.title: particle generator linkNo parameter width
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2576 evidence suggests particle generator APIs around hsd_8039EFAC, hsd_8039F05C, and hsd_8039F6CC use int/s32-width linkNo rather than s8/u8; hsd_8039F05C and efLib_CreateGenerator were updated accordingly.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: int linkNo convention used by surrounding particle APIs
raw_diff: hsd_8039F05C signature and efLib_CreateGenerator local changes
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path-specific API convention; should be curated as a path fact only after checking current headers and surrounding callers.

source_update_candidates.title: Scoped pragmas need explicit regression evidence
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2576 used a tightly scoped dont_inline pragma around hsd_80393D2C and the report shows the function matched. Because the slice lacks adjacent-function regression evidence, this supports only a candidate reminder that pragma exceptions should stay tightly scoped and documented, not a broader endorsement of pragma use.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: #pragma push/#pragma dont_inline on/#pragma pop around hsd_80393D2C
text_corpus issue_comment: hsd_80393D2C reached 100.00%
source_update_candidates.reason: Aligns with existing avoid-pragmas-register-asm and matching-tactics standards; curator may decide whether this PR is worth indexing as an example rather than updating the standard.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the dont_inline use in hsd_80393D2C as normal decomp style; the PR evidence only shows a local matched result, not broad justification.
Do not mark hsd_8039F05C as matched; the report shows it improved only from 80.55% to 80.79%, and the diff retains a TODO about section anchor/register allocation issues.
Do not infer human reviewer approval rationale; the slice has no human review comments.
